name: variants
visual_summary: The variants component is a customizable button with two styles: default and shiny. It has a rounded full shape and is interactive when hovered. Developers can use this component as a standard button in their applications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: variants
Description: The variants component is a customizable button with two styles: default and shiny. It has a rounded full shape and is interactive when hovered. Developers can use this component as a standard button in their applications.
Style: rounded, full, interactive
Interactions: hover, clickable
Tags: button, style, interaction

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// components/variants.ts
const buttonNormalize =
  "py-2.5 px-4 rounded-full duration-150 font-medium text-center text-sm";
export const buttonVariants = {
  default: "bg-zinc-50 hover:bg-zinc-200 " + buttonNormalize,
  shiny: "bg-shiny text-zinc-300 " + buttonNormalize,
};
